issues.problem: DDL defines column as [ListName] varchar(max) NULL but wiki Element #4 documents it as 'Name'. The SP inserts positionally — the 4th value (Name from #ListCIDMapping_Log) maps to DDL position 4 = [ListName]. All sample queries in Section 7 and references in Sections 2/3 use the wrong column name.

Tagged [UNVERIFIED] (Tier 4 — inferred) but GETDATE() is explicitly visible as the 9th positional value in the SP INSERT. Sibling wiki Dealing_CEPWeeklyAudit_Rules correctly uses (Tier 4 — SP_W_CEPWeeklyAudit) without UNVERIFIED.
No Phase Gate Checklist present. Row count and date range stats appear in Section 1 but no P2/P3 evidence trail exists to confirm data validation was performed.
TypeOfChange has only 2 real values (CID Added, CID Deleted) plus NULL — ideal for inline key=value enumeration in the Elements table cell, but values are only mentioned in Section 2 prose.
Lineage section lacks formal 5.1/5.2 subsection numbering per golden reference shape.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Rename Element #4 from 'Name' to 'ListName' to match DDL [ListName] varchar(max) NULL — update all references in Sections 2, 3, 6, and 7 sample queries. (2) Remove [UNVERIFIED] from UpdateDate and tag as (Tier 4 — SP_W_CEPWeeklyAudit) consistent with sibling wikis. (3) Add Phase Gate Checklist section. (4) Add inline enum values to TypeOfChange Element description: 'CID Added', 'CID Deleted'; NULL = no-change placeholder. (5) Fix all sample queries in Section 7 to use ListName instead of Name.
